entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Oryza sativa cv. N22, the crop studied for its response to water deficit and heat stress

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A state of limited water availability that affects rice growth and development

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A state of high temperature that affects rice growth and development

entities.name: FLOWERING STAGE
entities.description: The most sensitive growth stage of rice where water deficit and heat stress cause sterility

entities.name: SPIKELET STERILITY
entities.description: The failure of spikelets to develop into viable seeds due to stress

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from spikelet sterility

entities.name: PEDUNCLE ELONGATION
entities.description: The growth process of the peduncle, which is reduced by water deficit and heat stress

entities.name: SPIKELET FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of spikelets to produce viable seeds

entities.name: THERMO-TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand heat stress, potentially acquired through prior water-deficit stress

entities.name: POLLEN GERMINATION
entities.description: The physiological process of pollen grains sprouting to fertilize the ovule

entities.name: POLLEN ALLERGENS
entities.description: Proteins that favor pollen germination and are upregulated by water deficit

entities.name: BETA EXPANSIN
entities.description: Proteins that favor pollen germination and are upregulated by water deficit

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK TRANSCRIPTS
entities.description: RNA molecules that are significantly up-regulated under combined water deficit and heat stress

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK PROTEINS
entities.description: Chaperonic proteins that are significantly up-regulated under combined water deficit and heat stress

entities.name: PROTEOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the proteomic response of spikelets to combined water deficit and heat stress

relationships.description: upregulates in combination with heat stress
upregulates in combination with water deficit

upregulates in combination with water deficit
